job_listing.job_description: Oversee intellectual property strategy and manage international contract disputes. Must have 7+ years of experience in corporate law.

candidate_resume.summary: Senior Associate at a top firm specializing in Family Law and Divorce mediation.

experience.responsibilities: Managed 50+ high-net-worth divorce cases. Expert in litigation and mediation.

suggested_interviewer_questions: Your background is in Family Law. How will you apply your mediation skills to high-stakes corporate IP disputes?
Can you walk me through your experience managing cross-border legal compliance?

sample_candidate_responses.response: Mediation is about finding a 'middle ground' regardless of the subject matter. I believe my ability to de-escalate high-emotion divorce cases will translate well into aggressive corporate negotiations.
I haven't handled international corporate compliance yet, but I am an expert at navigating complex state-level regulations and am a quick study on new legal frameworks.

must_flag: If the interviewer misses the total lack of IP law experience.

guardrail_checks.topic_lock: Professional interview and resume prep only.
